name: f1-game-telemetry
description: This project is a real-time dashboard for Codemasters' Formula 1 games (F1 23, F1 24, etc.). It captures telemetry data sent by the game via UDP and displays it in a modern, detailed web interface.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently "npm start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run mock --prefix server"
